heading: Omitted
label: 1226 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for shares not distributed within two years to revert to the tribe, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 91–364, § 684 Stat. 689July 31, 1970
